resources.string: He hmun hi a ruak tur a ni lo.
App aṭanga chhuak turin \"Back\" button hmet nawn rawh
Server list tarlan theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Server settings siam theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Server settings update theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Server settings paih theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
He chhanna hi pek ngei ngei tur.
Audio record theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
I lock pattern save mek a ni
He server hi i paih chuan, draft leh form thehluh tawh zawng zawng i device aṭangin paih a ni ang. Paih tho dawn em?
Sut turin khawilai pawh hmet rawh
Form thehluh theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Form thehluh theih a ni lo: %s
Chhanna ṭhenkhat dik lo a awm
I file te finfiah theih a nih nan, Tella in i awmna a chhinchhiah a ngai a, i GPS hman theihna a mamawh.
Form list update theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
He form tarlan kawngah hian dik lo a awm. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
He form hi i device aṭangin i paih duh takzet em? Thehluh tawh a nih avangin, a data erawh in organization server-ah a la awm ang.
He draft form hi i paih duh takzet em?
Ka device ṭawng hman ang hi Tella-ah hman tur
He form thehlut tur hian phalna i nei lo. Tihpalh a ni in i hria a nih chuan, i organization be rawh
File lakluh (import) theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Internet i connect lo. I connect hunah i ti nawn leh dawn nia
Form pumin emaw a ṭhen thehluh a ni lo. I paih duh takzet em?
File dahchhuah (export) theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
File dahchhuak turin, Tella in i device storage hman phalna a mamawh.
File paih theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh.
File i thlan hi i gallery aṭangin hlen hlenin paih a ni ang.
Hei hian i file chu Tella pawn aṭangin, i device gallery-ah leh app dangte hman theihin a siam ang.
File-te lak luh (import) tura gallery hawn kawngah hian dik lo a awm. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
File save theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
File thun tel (attach) kawngah hian dik lo a awm. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Form download theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Form download theih a ni lo: %s
Form zawn hmuh a ni lo. I organization server aṭangin paih a ni tawh thei
He URL hi a dik lo.
A thar ber aṭanga a hlui ber
A hlui ber aṭanga a thar ber
Username emaw password a dik lo.
Server connect theih a ni lo.
Internet i connect lo. I connect hunah ti nawn leh rawh.
Tella a inthup ṭhat lehzual theih nan icon leh hming thlang rawh. Hriat tur: Android settings-ah chuan Tella icon hi a la lang thei ang.
I device leh awmna te chhinchhiaha i file te finfiah theih a nih nan.
To receive forms and submit data, you must first connect to a compatible server. Ask your organization for the server information and set up the server here.
Form thehluh tarlan tur a awm lo.
Form tarlan tur a awm lo. I server connect-ah form thar a awm leh awm loh en turin refresh hmet rawh.
Hming leh logo dang thlang rawh
File tarlan tur a awm lo. File la lut turin + button hmet rawh.
Internet i connect lo. I connect hunah ti nawn leh rawh
Crash report hian Tella siamṭhat kawngah min pui a ni. Mahni in a in-send anga, i device leh Android version a tel ang.
\"%s\" ami zawhna zawng zawngte hi i chhang nawn leh thei ang.
\"%s\" ami zawhna zawng zawngte hi i chhang thei ang.
Attachment thun theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Awmna chhinchhiah turin khawilai pawh second 3 chhung hmet rawh.
Signature save theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Draft leh form thehluh tawh paihna
Form tarlan theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
I internet connection in form a thehlut zo lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Form leh server zawng zawng paih a ni
Form la tur leh data thehlut turin, server i connect hmasak a ngai. Server chungchang i organization zawt la, server set up rawh.
If you would like to create your own forms, contact us or use any service based on the Open Data Kit (ODK)
Internet i connect loh pawhin form i chhang thei ang. I connect veleh thehluh a ni mai ang.
File i thun tel a len lutuk avangin he form hi thehluh theih a ni lo. File te zawk thun tel rawh
Tunah i chhuah chuan thehluh a tawp ang a, file thehluh la bangte chu nakinah i thehlut thei tho ang.
Item tick loh te chu nakina thehluh turin save a ni ang.
Nakina thehluh turin form save a ni
Verification mode chu ON a ni a, mahse GPS a OFF. I thil finfiahnate i awmna nen a inmil theih nan GPS ON rawh.
Form list update mek a ni…
Verification thuchian thun tel dawn em?
File i thlan ṭhenkhatah hian verification data (device, network leh awmna) a tel a. Him tawk a i hriat chinah chauh share ang che.
I file finfiah theih a nih nan Tella in thuchian a chhinchhiah mek. Minute engemaw zat a ngai thei. Fiah ṭha zawk i duh chuan van thengreng hmuh theihnaah awm ang che.
Tella folder chhunga file awmna chin.
File hriat hran theihna number bik.
Device-a he file siamṭhat leh hun.
Android device hriat hran theihna number bik.
Device in awmna tlangpui a hriat.
Device chu internet nen a in-connect em tih.
Internet a connect a nih chuan, Wi-Fi emaw mobile data nge a hman tih.
Device Wi-Fi hriat hran theihna bik.
Device internet connection hriat hran theihna address bik.
Device internet connection hriat hran theihna address thar zawk.
Device awmna diktak (latitude, longitude, altitude, dikzawng leh teh hun a tel).
Awmna chhui chhuah dan. \"Fused\" a nih chuan awlsam zawk nan hmanrua (GPS leh network) hman pawlh a ni tihna a ni.
Device in meter per second a hmun a sawn chak lam.
Device in cell tower a connect zawng zawng number.
Device kianga Wi-Fi network awm zawng zawng hming.
Form ṭhenkhat update a ni. Version thar ber nei turin form bula update button hmet rawh.
Khawi server-ah nge file upload i duh?
Server connect i duh chi thlang rawh. I chian loh chuan, i organization zawt rawh.
Resolution a san poh leh video a fiah ang a, mahse file a lian thung ang.
Tella chuan i thlalak, video, emaw audio record te chu lak a nih emaw Tella-a dah luh a nih veleh server-ah a upload nghal ang.
Khawi server-ah nge file te hi auto-upload i duh?
Server i thlan ngei a ngai.
Tella hi engtin nge lock i duh?
Thla i lak laia mi mit a lak loh nan camera rik dan off rawh.
Hmanhmawh thilah Tella ami file te awlsam taka paihna turin homescreen-ah button a tarlang ang.
In organization-a data thawn tur leh la turin server connect rawh
Thla lak, video, emaw audio record te chu lak a nih emaw Tella-a dah luh a nih veleh Reports server-ah upload nghal rawh.
Hman a nih chuan, Tella in file upload zawh veleh a paih nghal ang.
I thlalak, video, leh audio file te chu lak a nih veleh a in-upload anga, Tella a file i lak luh apiang pawh automatic in a in-upload ang.
I file te chu server-ah a in-upload tawh lo ang.
I file te chu upload a nih zawhah automatic-in a in-paih tawh lo ang.
Tella lock tura hun a hman tur bituk rawh
Tella-a file awm zawng zawng paihna.
Draft leh form thehluh tawh zawng zawng paihna.
I Connections leh a kaihhnawih data zawng zawng paihna.
App leh a chhunga data zawng zawng paihna. “He app hi i paih (uninstall) duh em?” tia zawh i ni ang. I nemngheh loh chuan, Tella hi paih a ni lo ang.
I awmna hmuna Tella dan chah tumna te paltlang rawh. Hriat tur: Hei i on chuan server-a data thawn a muang deuh ang.
I app chu tunah hian Calculator app angin thup a ni
Tella inthup dan tur i duh ber thlang rawh
Inthupna pahnih a awm. A hmasa hi a rang a mahse a him lo deuh; a pahnihna hi a buaithlak deuh a mahse a him thung.
Tella chu home screen-ah hming leh icon dangin a lang ang
app tak tak hnungah thup rawh
A him ber: Tella chu app tak tak hman theih hnungah thup rawh
A him tawk lo: Tella chu home screen-ah hming leh icon dangin a lang ang. Icon thar hmehin Tella tak tak a inhawng ang.
A him zawk: Calculator app tak tak hnungah Tella thup rawh. Tella hawng turin calculator-ah i PIN chhu lut rawh.
The Calculator camouflage is only possible if you use a PIN lock. Change lock here
I lock dan i thlak chuan, Inthupna a in-off ang
Audio record chu i Tella file-ah save a ni
Tella-ah kan lo lawm a che
Tella chhungah h hian thla la in video la nghal rawh. Heng file te hi automatic-a encrypt niin Tella-ah save a ni ang a, i phone gallery pangaiah a lang lo ang.
Tella voice recorder hmangin thil zawhfiahna (interviews) emaw i vela ri apiang record rawh. Audio file te hi automatic-a encrypt a ni ang a, Tella folder inthupah save a ni ang.
I file zawng zawng him takin vawng ṭhain remkhawm rawh. Tella i lock chhung chu i device rawn endik emaw laksak tumtu in i file leh folder-te an hawng thei lo ang.
I lock siam peih a ni! Settings-ah i thlak thei reng a nia.
Tella-ah i lut thei tawh e, emaw Tella hi i duh danin advanced settings aṭangin i siamrem thei bawk.
Organization nena in thawkho a nih chuan, file leh data thawn turin organization server connect rawh. I organization in server thuchian an pe ang che.
I device-a zawn hmuh a harsat theih nan, i homescreen-a a landan thlakin Tella i thup thei.
Tella chu home screen-ah a lang ang
Settings-ah i duh danin i siamrem thei reng a nia.
Tella leh server i connect hlawhtling e, i data i share thei tawh ang.
I inthupna siam zawh a ni! Settings-ah i thlak thei reng a nia.
Calculator inthupna hi PIN lock i hman chauhvin a theih.
Tella chu Calculator app hman theih tak tak hnungah thup a ni ang. Tella hawng turin calculator-ah i PIN chhu lut la, chu mi hnuah = hmet ang che.
Tella homescreen-ah i file hman hnuhnunte lang theiin leh awlsam taka hawn theihin dah rawh.
Tella homescreen-ah i form duh berte awlsam taka hawn theihin tarlang rawh.
Inthupna hmang turin Tella aṭangin chhuak dawn em?
Tella hawng leh turin, i app zingah %s app icon hi zawng ang che.
Tella hawng leh turin, i app zingah Calculator app icon hi zawng ang che. Tella hawng turin Calculator-ah i PIN chhu lut la, “=” hmet ang che.
Nakinah server dang i belh huna i hriat hran theih nan i server hi hming pe rawh. Organization hming emaw, project hming emaw a ni thei.
Lakluh leh encrypt mek a ni
I recording save a ni lo. I chhuah hmain save i duh em?
Encrypt lai titawpin file paih dawn em?
I tihtawp chuan, i file a bo ang
Lock dan thlakin inthupna paih dawn em?
I Calculator inthupna hman lai hi PIN lock nen chauh a inmil. I lock dan i thlak chuan, Tella a inthup tawh lo anga, i phone homescreen-ah a lang ang.
I inthup dan thlak turin i password chhu lut rawh
He template hi i paih duh takzet em?
He Uwazi collection hi ṭawng hrang hrangin a hman theih. Template i download duhna ṭawng kha thlang rawh.
Tella homescreen-ah i template duh berte awlsam taka hawn theihin tarlang rawh.
Template save i nei lo. Template thar belh turin “+” button hmet rawh.
Entity thehluh tawh i nei lo.
I Outbox a ruak. Entity thehluh theih inpeihsa te hetah hian a lang ang.
He draft hi i paih duh takzet em?
Entity chu draft-ah save a ni.
He URL hi a dik lo
A chhanna pek ngei ngei turte hi i chhan a ngai
Title i pek ngei ngei a ngai
A ni pahnihna hi a hmasa zawk hnu ami a ni tur a ni
File i duh zat zat thlang rawh
Audio emaw video file thlang rawh
Video emaw audio file thun tel rawh
File belh dan tur thlang rawh
He chhanna hi pek ngei ngei tur.
PDF file i duh zat zat thun tel rawh
PDF file belh dan tur thlang rawh

Hengte hi entity i la thehluh lohte an ni.
Chhunzawm turin entity hi hmet rawh.
Hengte hi entity thehluh mai theih emaw a ṭhen thehluh tawhte an ni.
Hengte hi entity i thehluh tawhte an ni.
File belh dan tur thlang rawh
\"%1$s\" hi i paih duh takzet em?
Kum khat aia rei liamta ah khan
Heng template te hi Uwazi i connect aṭanga hman theihte an ni.
Hengte hi Uwazi template i chhan theihte an ni.
Username leh password i neih chuan log in rawh, emaw server public access hmang rawh.
He Uwazi hmang tur hian step hnih in-finfiahna a ngai. I authenticator app aṭangin digit 6 code chhu lut rawh.
Finfiahna code a dik lo emaw a thi tawh. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh.
Server i connect hlawhtling e, i data i share thei tawh ang.
Server luh nan log in rawh
{\"zero\":\"\",\"one\":\"File thlan hi Tella atangin a hlenin paih a ni ang.\",\"two\":\"\",\"few\":\"\",\"many\":\"\",\"other\":\"File thlante hi Tella atangin a hlenin paih a ni ang.\"}
Nakina thehluh turin attachment te hi tick suh. I Outbox aṭangin i thehlut thei ang.
I chhuah chuan i form thehluh a tawp ang. I Outbox aṭangin nakinah i thehlut chhunzawm thei ang.
I form thehluh tih tawp a ni. Outbox aṭangin i chhunzawm thei ang.
Khawngaihin nghak rawh. Second tlemte hnuah i device home screen-ah i let ang.
He draft hi i paih duh takzet em?
He form hi i paih duh takzet em?
Tella chhungah screenshot leh screen record theih lohin siam la, recent app list-ah lang lo turin siam rawh
I chian loh chuan, i organization zawt rawh.
He thil hi i tih chhung chuan, Tella hi minute 3 chhung a in-unlock ang.
Tella hi engtin nge set up i duh?
App hi enchiang la, i duh danin siamrem rawh
Lock siam la, ṭan nghal rawh
Ka organization aṭangin code ka nei
I customization code chhu lut rawh
I organization in anmahni settings anga Tella i set up theih nan code an pe thei che.
File verification thuchian zawn hmuh theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
File upload tur zawn hmuh theih a ni lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Audio record turin, Tella in i microphone hman phalna a mamawh.
Camera hawng turin khawilai pawh hmet rawh
File chu i gallery-ah belh a ni
Thlalak, video, leh audio file la turin, Tella in i camera leh microphone hman phalna a mamawh.
Thla la tur leh video la turin, Tella in i camera hman phalna a mamawh.
Data thawn turin server i connect dan thunun rawh.
I server connect te hi i paih vek dawn nge i thup ringawt dawn? I thup chuan server thuchian a la vawng anga, awlsam takin i connect lehin data i thehlut thei ang.
He server hi i paih chuan, i file te automatic-in a in-upload tawh lo ang.
Server-a upload a nih veleh Tella in i device aṭangin file a paih nghal ang.
He server-ah hian file i upload thei tawh lo ang.
I data share turin i inziaklut tawh.
Tella library ṭhenkhat kan update a, form zawng zawng kan download ṭhat a ngai.
Form kan update chhung khawngaihin nghak rawh.
Username leh password i nei em?
Project luh nan log in rawh
Tella Settings-ah i Reports duh dan i thlak thei reng a nia.
I file-te finfiah theih a nih nan, report i thawnin i device leh awmna thuchian telh rawh.
Thildang i tih emaw Tella aṭanga i chhuah pawhin report upload chhunzawm rawh. FIMKHUR: Hei i on chuan, report zawng zawng upload zawh a nih hma chu Tella a in-lock lo ang.
Tella Settings-ah i Reports duh dan i thlak thei reng a nia.
I Drafts a ruak. Report i la thehluh lohte hetah hian a lang ang.
I Outbox a ruak. Report thehluh mai theih te hetah hian a lang ang.
Report thehluh tawh i nei lo.
File-te hetah hian thun tel rawh
Report chu draft-ah save a ni
He report hi i paih duh takzet em?
He report thehluh tawh hi i records aṭanga paih i duh takzet em?
He project hi i connect sa tawh. Khawngaihin URL dang chhu lut rawh.
I report chu Outbox-ah save a ni. I peih hunah i thehlut (submit) thei ang.
Auto-report hi connection pakhat aia tamah hman theih a ni lo. Hman theih nan hmun dangah auto-report off rawh.
Tella-a thlalak/video/audio i record apiangin, report chu automatic in siam a ni ang a, he project-ah hian upload a ni ang.
He project-a report anga upload a nih veleh file te chu i device aṭangin automatic in paih rawh.
Report thehlut turin, title chhu lut la, a hrilhfiahna emaw file thun tel rawh.
Tella-ah thlalak leh video lakluh a nihin EXIF metadata vawngṭha rawh. Hemi ah hian image siam hun, camera settings, awmna leh i device thuchian a tel.
Unlock theih zat bang tarlang rawh
Unlock screen-ah, Tella chhunga thil awm zawng zawng paih a nih hmaa unlock theih zat bang tarlang rawh
Unlock theih loh hnuah paih rawh
Tella chhunga thil awm zawng zawng paih a nih hmaa unlock theih loh vawi engzat nge theih dawn tih bithliah rawh.
Unlock screen-ah, Tella chhunga thil awm zawng zawng paih a nih hmaa unlock theih zat bang tarlang rawh
Unlock vawi %1$d i theih loh chuan i Tella data paih a ni ang
He thil hi calculator inthupna nen a hman theih loh. Hmang thei turin i inthup dan thlak rawh.
File i lakluh te chu report angin automatic-a upload a ni.
Thlalak/video i lak te chu report angin automatic-a upload a ni.
Recording i siam chu report angin automatic-a upload a ni.
File i lakluh te chu report anga upload a nih hnuah automatic-a paih a ni.
"Thlalak/video i lak te chu report anga upload a nih hnuah automatic-a paih a ni."
"Recording i siam chu report anga upload a nih hnuah automatic-a paih a ni."
I report chu Outbox-ah a awm
Report thehlut turin, project thlang la, title chhu lutin a hrilhfiahna emaw file thun tel rawh.
File te chu paih a ni.
I tihdanglam te chu file pangai copy angin save a ni.
I tihdanglam te save a ni lo. I chhuah hmain save i duh em?
I Tella ami paih vek a nih hmain vawi 1 i ti thei tawh ang.
I Tella ami paih vek a nih hmain vawi %1$d i ti thei tawh ang.
Login theih loh i ngah lutuk ta. I Tella data zawng zawng paih a ni ta.
A lan mawi zawk nan text sei deuh te chu sir tuak inzawlin rem rawh. A off chuan, chhiar awlsam zawk nan text chu a vei emaw ding lamah a in tlar ang.
Tlar inkar 150% ah leh paragraph inkar 225% ah zauh rawh.
Tella in refresh a ti dawn
Second tlemte hnuah a hmaa screen-ah khan i let leh ang.
FIMKHUR: he thil i hman hian network entu tuemaw hnenah Tella i hmang tih a hriattir thei. He hlauhawm hi i pawm theih chauhvin hmang ang che.

Bug i tawk emaw, thil thar telh tur rawt duh i neih emaw, sawi duh dang i neih chuan min hrilh rawh. He i rawtna hi tu hnen aṭanga dawn nge tih hriat theih a ni lo a, chuvangin kan chhanna i beisei chuan i biak pawh theihna tur telh ang che.
I rawtna avangin kan lawm e!
I rawtna thehlut turin engtikah pawh i lo let thei ang.
Internet i connect lo. I connect hunah i rawtna hi automatic-in thehluh a ni ang.
I Outbox a ruak. Form thehluh theih inpeihsa te hetah hian a lang ang.
Hengte hi form ruak i chhan theihte an ni.
Hengte hi background-a thil tih mek te an ni.
Tunah hian background-a thil tih mek a awm lo.
Background-ah file encrypt mek a awm. I chhuah chuan i file te a bo ang, i chhuak duh tho em?
Background-ah file encrypt mek a awm. I chhuah chuan i file te a bo ang, i chhuak duh tho em?
Resource download i la nei lo. Ṭan turin a hnuaia resource tin bula “download” icon hi hmet rawh.
Resource download i la nei lo.
Hengte hi i Tella Web project aṭanga download theih resources te chu an ni.
I Tella Web project aṭangin download theih resource a awm lo.
\"%s\" chu download aṭangin paih a ni.
I thil download lai a bo ang. Nakinah download turin i let leh thei reng a nia.
Dik lo a awm: Download theih a ni lo
Chhuak la verification thuchian paih rawh
Tella in i device leh awmna thuchian a la record mek. I chhuah chuan, i file hi finfiah theih a ni lo ang.
⚠️ Version tharah inthlak danglamna lian a awm dawn

Tella version lehpekah chuan (15 July 2024-a tlangzarh tur) thiamna lamah hmasawnna lian tak a awm dawn a. Heng inthlakna avang hian version thara update hunah file ṭhenkhat bo palh theihna chance tlem a awm.
File pawimawh tak Tella-ah i dah a nih chuan, update hmain Tella pawn lamah him takin copy chhuak turin kan rawn che u.
Inthlak danglamna awm tur leh Tella aṭanga file zawng zawng dahchhuah dan hriatchian lehzual nan a hnuaia ‘Hriatchian Lehzual Nan’ hi hmet rawh.
He property nena thlunzawm i duh entity te thlang rawh.
Hriattirna: Tella thuamṭhat nan i app hman dan (analytics) i share mek a ni. Settings-ah lutin engtikah pawh i titawp thei ang.
Data kan khâwm dân hrechiang lehzual tûrin,
Settings-ah lûtin engtik lai pawhin i inhnûkdâwk (opt out) thei ang.
Data kan khâwm dân hrechiang lehzual tûrin, he phek hi tlawh rawh.

• Analytics atân DivviUp, mimal dinhmun humhimna dâwt (privacy-respecting system) kan hmang. • A tlêm theipatawpin data kan la khâwm ṭhîn. • Data zawng zawng hi nihna thup (anonymous) a ni a, i nihna chhui theih a ni ngai lo vang.
Zirchianna tin hian zawhna bîk aṭangin data an khâwm ṭhîn. A entîrna chu hengte hi a ni:
🔓 Tella kâr khatah vawi 4 hawn a ni 💾 File 32 Tella-ah dah a ni 📖 Spanish ṭawng thlan a ni ⚡ Server 1 inzawmtîr a ni 😎 Calculator inthupna (camouflage) on a ni
Tella tihhmasawn nân i data ṭâwm rawh
He zirchiannaa tel hian, eng feature-te nge i tâna pawimawh leh app i hman dân min hriatthiamtîr dâwn a ni.
I mimal dinhmun (privacy) kan zahsak che
• Tella-a file i dahṭhate emaw i pâwl (organization) hnêna i thawnte rêng rêng hi luhchhuah (access) theihna kan nei lo. • I data hi tu hnênah mah kan hralhin kan ṭâwm ngai lo vang.
Tella tihhmasawn nân analytics ṭâwm rawh

Tella i hman dân min hriatthiamtîr rawh. Data zawng zawng hi nihna thup (anonymous) a ni a, i nihna chhui theih a ni ngai lo vang.
Tella team hnênah analytics i ṭâwm duh em?
Tella i hman dân min hriatthiamtîr rawh. I data hmang hian i nihna (identity) chhui theih a ni ngai lo vang.
Tella i hman dân min hriatthiamtîr rawh. I data hmang hian i nihna (identity) chhui theih a ni ngai lo vang.
He property nêna inzawmtîr i duh entity-te chu zawng rawh emaw thlang rawh.
Analytics i inṭâwmpui (share) chhunzawm tawh lo vang. Hei hi Settings aṭangin i thlâk danglam thei reng e.

The database migration failed. If you have a backup of your files, please reinstall Tella and re-import your files into Tella. If you don\'t have a backup and you lost your files, do not delete Tella and contact us: contact@tella-app.org

The database migration failed. If you have a backup of your files, please reinstall Tella and re-import your files into Tella. If you don\'t have a backup and you lost your files, do not delete Tella and contact us: contact@tella-app.org
Pâwl (organization) nêna in thawk a nih chuan, form, report, leh file-te chu Tella aṭangin i pâwl hnênah thawn nghâl rawh.
Drive chi hrang hrangte chungchâng hrechiang lehzual rawh.
Pâwl (organization) Shared Drive-ah i inzawm thei a, a nih loh pawhin i mimal Drive-ah folder thar i siam thei bawk.
Eng ang server-ah nge inzawm i duh?

A hnuaia hming (category) târ lante atân hian, rualin inzawmna (connection) pakhat chauh hman theih a ni. Inzawmna thar siam belh tûrin, khawngaihin Connections Settings-ah lûtin tûna i hman lai hi paih (delete) hmasa rawh.
He folder-a upload tûr hian phalna i nei lo.
Pâwl (organization) nêna in thawk a nih chuan, file leh data thawn tûrin an server-ah inzawm rawh. I pâwl thawhpuite chuan server chanchin (details) an pe tûr che a ni.
Hengte hi report i thawh mekte an ni.
Heng report te hi thehluh theih a inpeih tawh a ni
Hêngte hi report hlawhtling taka i thehluh tawhte chu an ni.
Hetah hian inzawmnate (connections) chungchâng hrechiang lehzual rawh. Pâwl (organization) nêna in thawk a nih chuan, eng connection nge hman tûr tih an hnênah i zâwt thei ang.
Hetah hian inzawmnate (connections) chungchâng hrechiang lehzual rawh.
I report-te chu i Nextcloud-a folder tharah upload a ni ang. He folder hming tûr hi hetah hian thlang rawh.
Server inzawm a hlawhchham. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh.
- The server certificate is not trusted
- The server certificate valid dates are in the future
- The URL does not match the hostname in the certificate
Eng pawh ni se he certificate hi rin i duh em?
This digest algorithm is not available on your phone.
There is a problem loading the certificate.
The certificate could not be shown.
The identity of the server could not be verified
I report-te chu i Google Drive-a folder tharah upload a ni ang. He folder hming tûr hi hetah hian thlang rawh.
Folder hming a ruak thei lo
File hming hi hman sa a ni. Khawngaihin a dang hmang rawh.
Folder hming hi hman sa a ni. Khawngaihin a dang hmang rawh.
Tûnah rih chuan, Nextcloud server-ah file 20MB aia tête chauh thehluh theih a ni.
I report chu hlawhtling taka thehluh a ni e.
File lâk luh i tum hi a awm tawh lo. Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh.
File manager app hmuh a ni lo. File la lût tûrin khawngaihin file manager app (Google Files, Fossify File Manager, emaw file manager dang eng pawh) install rawh.

I kalhna (lock) chauh hi i Tella file-a luh theihna awm chhun a ni.
I kalhna i theihnghilh chuan, tûnah rih chuan dawn kîr theihna kawng a awm lo. Tella chhûnga i data-te chu a bo hlen vang.
I kalhna (lock) chu hriat reng tum la, a nih loh pawhin password manager ang hmun himah vawng ṭha rawh.
Your lock is set up! You can change it anytime in the Tella Settings.
I device aṭangin he form hi paih i duh chiang em? Thehluh tawh a nih avângin, data chu in pâwl (organization) server-ah a la awm reng thung ang.
Google Drive folder thar siam rawh
Tella hian shared drive a thlâwp tawh lo. Google Drive-a report thehluh chhunzawm zêl tûrin, khawngaihin mimal folder thar siam rawh.
Google Drive inzawmtîr ṭha leh rawh
He folder hi luh theih a ni tawh lo. Report thehluh chhunzawm zêl tûrin, khawngaihin folder thar siam rawh emaw i account inzawmtîr ṭha leh rawh.
Internet connection tel lovin i kiang hnaia device-te hnênah file thawn rawh.
Report thehlût tûrin, khawngaihin thupui (title) chhu lût la, file thil tel rawh.
Thawntuin a scan theih nân he QR code hi târ lang rawh
QR code hmanah buaina i nei em?
I device chanchin (information) târ lang rawh
I device nêna inzawm tûrin thawntuin a hnuaia mite hi a chhut luh a ngai.
Hêng nambat indawt hi thawntu device-a lang nên a inmil thlap em tih finfiah rawh.
Inzawmna a him ngei tih chian nân, a chunga nambat indawt hi dawngtu device-a lang nên a inmil thlap em tih finfiah rawh.
Inzawmna a him ngei tih chian nân, a chunga nambat indawt hi device danga lang nên a inmil thlap em tih finfiah rawh.
Nambat indawtte hi a inmil loh chuan, inzawmna hi a him tâwk lo thei a, hnâwl (discard) tûr a ni.
Device pahnihte chu Wi-Fi network thuhmunah an inzawm ve ve em tih finfiah rawh
1. Wi-Fi network chu internet-a inzawm kher a ngai lo. 2. I phone hotspot hmangin nangma Wi-Fi network i siam thei ang. 3. VPN connection inzawm lai reng reng titâwp (disable) rawh.
Aw, Wi-Fi network thuhmunah kan awm e

Internet connection awm lo pawhin i kiang hnaia device-te nên file inthawn tawn rawh u 1. Device pahnihte chu Wi-Fi network thuhmunah an inzawm ngei tûr a ni 2. File i inṭâwmpui tûr chu i rin ngam mi a ni em tih finfiah rawh
Nearby sharing chungchâng hrechiang lehzual rawh
Network-a zawn hmuh nân dawngtu device chanchin (information) chhu lût rawh
Hêng nambat indawt (sequence) hi thawntu device-a lang nên a inmil thlap em tih finfiah rawh.
Hêng nambat indawt (sequence) hi dawngtu device-a lang nên a inmil thlap em tih finfiah rawh
Hnâwl la ṭan ṭha leh rawh
Thawntuin file a rawn thawn hun nghâk mêk
Thawntu chuan file %1$d thawn che a tum mêk
Dawngtuin file a pawm hun nghâk mêk
Nearby sharing aṭanga chhuah tûr em ni?
I thil tih laite a bo vang.
"Dawngtuin file thawnte chu a pawm e"
File dawngin a thupna (encryption) siam mêk a ni
WiFi SSID la tûrin location phalna (permission) neih a ngai.
Location settings hawn theih a ni lo.
File thawn tihtâwp tûr em ni?
Nearby sharing chu tihtâwp a ni ang. Dawngtuin file kim lova thawnte chu a la thei lo vang.
Thil dik lo a awm tlat
File %1$d chauh dawn a ni. File %2$d dawn loh a ni.
Internet connection tel lova i kiang hnaia device-te hnêna file thawn tûrin he feature hi on (enable) rawh.

Internet connection awm emaw awm lo pawhin, i kiang hnaia device awm nên file inthawn tawn nghâl rawh.
A bul ṭan nân, dawngtu (recipient) nên Wi-Fi network thuhmunah inzawm rawh u. Wi-Fi network chu internet-ah inzawm lo pawh ni se Nearby Sharing hi hman theih a ni ang.
Nearby Sharing atâna Wi-Fi inzawm dân hrechiang lehzual rawh.

.... Wi-Fi kaltlanga in device-te thlunzawm dân kawng 2 a awm:
1. Wi-Fi router hman, in lama mi \t emaw hnathawhnaa mi angte
2. Device aṭanga Wi-Fi hotspot siam, \t phone, tablet, emaw computer angte aṭangin
\t\ta. Hmangtu pakhatin a device settings-ah lûtin \t\t hotspot connection a siam ang.
\t\tb. Hmangtu dang zâwkin chu hotspot-ah chuan inzawmna a siam ve thung ang.
Wi-Fi network in peihfel hnuah, in device settings-ah lût ula, in pahnihin Wi-Fi network thuhmunah in inzawm em tih finfiah rawh u.

• Wi-Fi network chuan internet access neih kher a \t ngai lo. Wi-Fi router emaw hotspot chu a \t nung a, a thawk ṭha a nih phawt chuan, \t online lo chung pawhin Nearby Sharing \t atân hman theih a ni
• VPN connection inzawm lai reng reng titâwp (disable) ngei ang che.
